prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Nausea, reduced appetite, and fatigue over the last 1-2 months with ongoing renal function decline.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.5 kg; Height 158.1 cm; BMI 33.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.6%), FPG (12 months ago 200mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 286mg/dL; 3 months ago 285mg/dL; current 232mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.1kg; 9 months ago 83.3kg; 6 months ago 82.2kg; 3 months ago 83.2kg; current 83.5kg), Height (12 months ago 158.1cm; 9 months ago 158.1cm; 6 months ago 158.1cm; 3 months ago 158.1cm; current 158.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 132U/L; 9 months ago 134U/L; 6 months ago 126U/L; 3 months ago 133U/L; current 128U/L), AST (12 months ago 102U/L; 9 months ago 96U/L; 6 months ago 95U/L; 3 months ago 93U/L; current 97U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.5mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.6mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 4.8mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.2mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 179mg/g; 9 months ago 139mg/g; 6 months ago 207mg/g; 3 months ago 160mg/g; current 230mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 121mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 142mg/dL; 3 months ago 138mg/dL; current 130mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.8g/dL; current 10.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 2.05 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
